## Checklist
- [ ] My code strictly adheres to the NumPy-only philosophy for core logic.
- [ ] I have provided a complete mathematical derivation or visualization in a related Jupyter notebook (if applicable).
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests in `tests/`.
- [ ] I have ensured Python type hints and Google-style docstrings are used.
- [ ] My code passes `pytest`.
